algorithm.name: AZURESPEECH
algorithm.description: Uses Azure Cognitive Services to perform speech-to-text.

properties.name: TARGET_SEGMENT_LENGTH
properties.description: If this value is less than or equal to 0, no segmenting will be performed.

properties.name: VFR_TARGET_SEGMENT_LENGTH
properties.description: If this value is less than or equal to 0, no segmenting will be performed on variable frame rate videos.

properties.name: ACS_URL
properties.description: Base URL for the Azure Speech-to-text REST endpoint, for example `https://eastus.api.cognitive.microsoft.com/speechtotext`. Do not include `/transcriptions`, `/v3.x`, or `?api-version=...`; the component appends the correct path and API version internally. Can also be provided by an environment variable with the same name. If both are provided, the job property is used.

properties.name: ACS_SUBSCRIPTION_KEY
properties.description: Azure Speech subscription key. Can also be provided by an environment variable with the same name. If both are provided, the job property is used.

properties.name: ACS_API_VERSION
properties.description: Speech-to-text REST API version to use. The component is tested with `2024-11-15` and `2025-10-15`. Defaults to `2025-10-15`. Unrecognized values are passed through to Azure with a warning, which can allow newer supported API versions to work without a code change.

properties.name: ACS_BLOB_CONTAINER_URL
properties.description: URL for the Azure Storage Blob container used to store uploaded media during processing. Can also be provided by an environment variable with the same name. If both are provided, the job property is used.

properties.name: ACS_BLOB_SERVICE_KEY
properties.description: Azure Storage account key used to access the blob container specified by `ACS_BLOB_CONTAINER_URL`. Can also be provided by an environment variable with the same name. If both are provided, the job property is used.

properties.name: LANGUAGE
properties.description: The language/locale, in BCP-47 format, to use for transcription. Refer to the README and the official Azure Speech language support page for supported batch transcription locales.

properties.name: DIARIZE
properties.description: Whether to split audio into speaker turns. Azure batch transcription currently uses a diarization configuration object internally; this component exposes a simple boolean switch.

properties.name: BLOB_ACCESS_TIME
properties.description: Time, in minutes, for which the uploaded blob URL should remain accessible to Azure Speech.

properties.name: TRANSCRIPTION_EXPIRATION
properties.description: Desired transcription retention period, in minutes. The component converts this to Azure's `timeToLiveHours` request field. Azure currently requires a minimum of 6 hours, so values below 360 minutes are effectively rounded up.

properties.name: USE_SAS_AUTH
properties.description: When true, the component appends a shared access signature (SAS) token to the uploaded recording URL before submitting the transcription job. When false, the storage account must still be accessible to Azure Speech, for example through the trusted Azure services / managed identity mechanism.

actions.name: AZURE SPEECH DETECTION ACTION
actions.description: Uses Azure Cognitive Services to perform speech-to-text in English.

actions.name: AZURE SPEECH DETECTION TO SPANISH ACTION
actions.description: Uses Azure Cognitive Services to perform speech-to-text in Spanish.

actions.name: AZURE SPEECH DETECTION WITH UPSTREAM SPEAKER ACTION
actions.description: Runs speech-to-text with Azure Cognitive Services on audio or video using language provided in feed-forward track.

tasks.name: AZURE SPEECH DETECTION TASK
tasks.description: Uses Azure Cognitive Services to perform speech-to-text in English.

tasks.name: AZURE SPEECH DETECTION TO SPANISH TASK
tasks.description: Uses Azure Cognitive Services to perform speech-to-text in Spanish.
actions: AZURE SPEECH DETECTION TO SPANISH ACTION

tasks.name: AZURE SPEECH DETECTION WITH UPSTREAM SPEAKER TASK
tasks.description: Runs speech-to-text with Azure Cognitive Services on audio or video using language provided in feed-forward track.
actions: AZURE SPEECH DETECTION WITH UPSTREAM SPEAKER ACTION

pipelines.name: AZURE SPEECH DETECTION PIPELINE
pipelines.description: Uses Azure Cognitive Services to perform speech-to-text in English.

pipelines.name: AZURE SPEECH DETECTION WITH KEYWORD TAGGING PIPELINE
pipelines.description: Uses Azure Cognitive Services to perform speech-to-text in English and performs keyword tagging.

pipelines.name: AZURE SPEECH DETECTION TO SPANISH WITH TRANSLATION TO ENGLISH PIPELINE
pipelines.description: Uses Azure Cognitive Services to perform speech-to-text in Spanish and translation to English.
tasks: AZURE SPEECH DETECTION TO SPANISH TASK
